title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MORONG GENERAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MORONG, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO RIZAL PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 26810 / 88 OG No. 18, 2537 (May 4, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7275, March 24, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MORONG GENERAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MORONG, PROVINCE OF RIZAL, TO RIZAL PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Morong General Hospital located in the Municipality of Morong, Province of Rizal, is hereby changed to Rizal Provincial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 15, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 24, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
